pre_game.message: Hi, I'm I. I’m trying to stay calm before things kick off, but I’m definitely feeling the stakes today. How are you holding up?
Nice to meet you, I. I'm B. I'm hanging in there, just trying to stay focused because I've got people at home counting on me. It’s a lot of pressure, isn't it?
It really is. I’m in the same boat—got people back home I’m determined to help out, so I get exactly where you’re coming from.
Glad I’m not the only one with that mindset. It definitely makes the motivation stronger. Who are you playing for, if you don't mind me asking?
My family, especially my parents. They’ve sacrificed a lot, and I want to finally give them some stability. How about you? Who’s back home for you?
My younger sister and my partner. They’ve had a rough couple of years, and I just want to give them some breathing room for once.
That’s a lot to carry, B. I really hope we can both walk away with enough to make things easier for the people we care about.
I really hope so too, I. It’s good to know I’m not the only one here with that kind of motivation.
Exactly. It’s a lot easier to stay focused when you’re not just doing it for yourself. Fingers crossed for both of us.
For sure. It was nice meeting you, I. I'm gonna go walk around a bit, but I really hope things work out for you and your folks.
Thanks, B. Same to you—I hope you can get that breathing room for your sister and partner. Good luck out there.
